[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101101 5
1 0010000011 3
2 0011010100 4
3 1101110110 7
4 1011001000 4
5 1011001011 6
6 0000100100 2
7 0010101101 5
